dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION The recommended dosage is one 10 mg alfuzosin hydrochloride extended-release tablet once daily. The extent of absorption of alfuzosin is 50% lower under fasting conditions. Therefore, alfuzosin hydrochloride extended-release tablets should be taken with food and with the same meal each day. The tablets should not be chewed or crushed. 10 mg once daily with food and with the same meal each day. ( 2 ) Tablets should not be chewed or crushed ( 2 , 12.3 )
